package_policy: This package exposes the method, evidence, validation gate, AI-use statement, model-reliability disclosure, data-availability statement, and claim traceability needed for scholarly review.

components.label: Research design
components.purpose: Defines scope, method sequence, integrity rules, and evidence boundaries.

components.label: Corpus register
components.purpose: Documents included texts, provenance, rights status, and inclusion rationale.

components.label: Annotation codebook
components.purpose: Defines MIPVU coding rules and review expectations.

components.label: Historical semantics notes
components.purpose: Records period-meaning controls and semantic-risk notes.

components.label: MIPVU annotations
components.purpose: Review-table export of lexical-unit metaphor decisions.

components.label: Reliability report
components.purpose: Shows the reliability sampling and adjudication workflow.

components.label: CMT mappings
components.purpose: Review-table export linking conceptual mappings to MIPVU evidence.

components.label: Corpus analysis
components.purpose: Summarizes frequency, distribution, salience, and chronology.

components.label: Critical metaphor analysis
components.purpose: Interprets persuasive and ideological functions.

components.label: Rhetorical/genre analysis
components.purpose: Controls claims by audience, occasion, genre, and agency structure.

components.label: Absence/agency analysis
components.purpose: Records displacement, silence, and agency limits.

components.label: Historical enactment/alignment
components.purpose: Corroborates symbolic patterns against historical context.

components.label: Support ratings
components.purpose: Records document-level and case-level support scores.

components.label: Koenigsbergian support synthesis
components.purpose: Presents the draft evidentiary-support assessment.

components.label: Claim traceability
components.purpose: Links support claims to evidence records and source metadata.

components.label: AI-use statement
components.purpose: Explains AI assistance and human scholarly responsibility.

components.label: Model-reliability disclosure
components.purpose: Separates accepted annotations, prior review, model diagnostics, human reliability, and reproducibility claims.

components.label: Model-reliability completion gate
components.purpose: Defines the final artifact, authority, documentation, protected-path, and repository validation gate.

components.label: Data availability
components.purpose: Explains shareable data, rights status, and reuse cautions.

components.label: Validation gate
components.purpose: Documents the milestone-level rebuild, validation, and publication checks.

components.label: Public-site readiness
components.purpose: Shows draft/placeholder signals on public pages.

known_limitations: Trace rows are draft review aids, not final publication claims.
Publication-grade historical citations remain required where historical notes say so.
Scores are provisional and based on reviewed Lincoln pilot evidence.
Full-corpus MIPVU review and reliability adjudication are pending.
Historical alignment notes require publication-grade citations.
Accepted annotations and prior human-review artifacts remain distinct from multi-model diagnostic outputs.
Model agreement does not establish human inter-annotator reliability, scholarly reproducibility, or evidentiary correctness.
Model-reliability packets and responses inherit source-level rights and storage restrictions.
